title: WaiSteam's More Items
body:
**A mod that adds more items into the game.**

_this mod is still in beta progress. things are subject to change._

This Minecraft mod adds more tools and items into the game. Currently working for Forge 1.20.1.
Fabric will be coming soon.

This mod is suitable for both client and server!

Main items of the mod : Bedrock items, Dusty Dust, more!
